M-006.NAME: admin-api
M-006.owns: dashboard stats, analytics, migration-safe routing summary, privileged system endpoints, admin audit logging, device peer enforcement, and M-047 MTProto operator endpoints

exports.fn-admin_auth: Dependency injection for admin authentication check
exports.fn-get_user_analytics: Return user counts, activity, subscription breakdown
exports.fn-get_revenue_analytics: Return payment totals, MRR, conversion metrics
exports.fn-get_system_health: Return node status, routing state, error rates
exports.fn-list-user-devices: Return device and anomaly state for operator review
exports.fn-admin-block-device: Block or unblock one device peer without disabling account
exports.fn-list-mtproto-assignments: Return redacted MTProto assignment rows for operator review
exports.fn-admin-mtproto-actions: Reissue or revoke one MTProto assignment with confirmation and safe audit details

execution-notes.note-2: Phase-33 extends backend/app/admin/router.py with M-047 MTProto admin operations; V-M-047 owns the targeted verification for those endpoints.
execution-notes.note-1: Phase-21 step-3 moved V-M-006 away from deleted route-policy tests and toward current admin auth plus device-control verification.

M-006.hotspot: H-014: Admin audit middleware must not log sensitive request bodies or tokens
